title: Levante Platform
no_models: No models included in your plan.
models_load_error: Could not load models. Please check your connection and try again.
logout_confirm_description: You will switch to standalone mode, where you'll need to configure your own API keys (OpenRouter, OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.) to use AI models. You can always log back in later from the Models page.
other_providers_description: Enable additional providers alongside Levante Platform.
other_providers_warning: External providers use your own credentials and billing.
